name: Ice Cream Christmas Pudding
recipeIngredient: 275 g jar (1 can) seedless maraschino cherries
100 g round white marshmallows, chopped into quarters
200 g violet crumble bar, chopped (not crumbled)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cherries and reserve the liquid.
2. Place the cherries in a small bowl and add the Cherry Marnier. Do not add too much liqueur, or it will prevent the ice cream from freezing.
3. Soak overnight.
4. The next day, remove the ice cream from the freezer to soften.
5. Cut the marshmallows into quarters and stir them into the cherries.
6. Transfer the softened ice cream into a large mixing bowl.
7. Stir in all the remaining ingredients along with enough reserved cherry liquid to achieve a pale pink color (add a few drops of pink food coloring if necessary).
8. Pour the mixture into a lamington tin and freeze until firm.
9. Cover with two layers of foil and store in the freezer until Christmas day.
10. Cut into squares before serving.
